title: Merchant Analytics Chatbot
description: Converted complex SQL queries into natural language dialogues using autonomous agents, with MCP-style tool routing to the database layer for safer, auditable merchant insights.
featuredDescription: Empowered merchants to query multi-million row databases using natural language, reducing data analysis time by 90%.

imageAlt.featured: Futuristic data dashboard showing complex neural networks and financial charts with blue glowing accents in a dark room environment
imageAlt.gallery: Futuristic data visualization dashboard with glowing blue nodes and connected neural pathways on a dark background

whatIDid: Mapped merchant questions to safe, parameterized SQL paths with validation before any database execution.
Implemented autonomous agents (LangChain-style) with tool routing to PostgreSQL and clear error handling for bad queries.
Designed the NL interface so non-technical users could explore multi-million-row datasets without analyst bottlenecks.
Collaborated on schema understanding, metric definitions, and prompt templates to improve answer quality over time.
Hardened the flow for production: logging, timeouts, and iterative tuning from real merchant usage.

title: License Plate Detection
description: Custom YOLOv8 model for high-speed motorway monitoring with 99.4% accuracy.
galleryDescription: High-speed license plate recognition system deployed on edge devices for secure facility management and automated logging.

imageAlt.featured: Night-time long exposure of cars on a highway with digital recognition bounding boxes and neon tracking overlays
imageAlt.gallery: Modern dark city street at night with streaks of light from moving vehicles and high-tech surveillance overlays

whatIDid: Trained and refined a custom YOLOv8 detector for plates under motion blur, low light, and motorway-scale scenes.
Built an OpenCV-based capture and preprocessing pipeline to stabilize inputs before inference.
Packaged the model for deployment targets that mirror edge constraints (latency, memory, and batch size).
Measured accuracy on validation and field-like footage; tuned augmentations and NMS for operational precision.
Aligned outputs with logging and alerting so security or traffic teams could act on detections reliably.

title: Customer Insight Chatbot
description: Built using LangChain & Pinecone, achieving a record-breaking 96% user satisfaction rating.
galleryDescription: A sophisticated RAG pipeline achieving 96% customer satisfaction by providing precise, context-aware support documentation.

imageAlt.gallery: Abstract representation of high-tech communication with glowing purple wave patterns and digital particles

whatIDid: Designed a RAG architecture with LangChain and Pinecone for accurate, citation-friendly support answers.
Ingested and chunked documentation; tuned embeddings and retrieval so answers stayed on-topic and up to date.
Exposed the assistant through APIs suitable for product integration and measured satisfaction in production.
Iterated on prompts, filters, and fallback behavior to reduce hallucinations and unsupported claims.
Tracked failure cases (missing docs, ambiguous questions) to expand the knowledge base and improve coverage.

title: Inventory Automation
description: Autonomous pipeline connecting ERP data with AI prediction models to automate re-stocking workflows.
galleryDescription: Architected a full-scale inventory management system that reduced manual data entry efforts by 98% through advanced OCR and intelligent reconciliation.

imageAlt.featured: Modern high-tech warehouse with glowing scanning lines and floating digital holographic labels on packages
imageAlt.gallery: Futuristic automated warehouse with glowing orange and blue robotic arms moving through vertical storage arrays

whatIDid: Connected ERP and stock data to forecasting and reorder logic so restocking could run with minimal manual entry.
Built OCR and parsing steps to turn scans and supplier documents into structured rows Pandas could reconcile.
Implemented validation rules and exception queues so bad reads did not silently corrupt inventory state.
Partnered with ops to define thresholds, safety stock, and human-in-the-loop approvals where risk was high.
Tracked effort and error rates before/after rollout to validate the 98% reduction claim in real workflows.

title: Autonomous Researcher
description: A multi-agent swarm capable of deep-web research, synthesizing complex datasets into structured technical reports.

imageAlt.gallery: Stylized digital globe with glowing fiber optic connections and data streams against deep black space

whatIDid: Designed a multi-agent workflow to search, summarize, and cross-check sources before drafting structured reports.
Orchestrated tool use (search, scraping where allowed, and citation handling) with clear stop conditions and budgets.
Normalized outputs into templates stakeholders could skim: key claims, sources, and open questions.
Reduced redundant work by parallelizing subtasks while keeping a single coherent narrative thread.
Tested edge cases (thin sources, conflicting pages) and added guardrails for unsupported statements.

title: Predictive Maintenance
description: ML-driven dashboard monitoring industrial equipment to predict failures before they happen, optimizing lifecycle management.

imageAlt.gallery: Microchip circuitry glowing with red and orange heat-map signals indicating sensor diagnostics and machine learning patterns

whatIDid: Ingested time-series sensor data and engineered features that reflect wear, vibration, and operating context.
Trained PyTorch models for failure risk scoring and calibrated thresholds with maintenance teams.
Built monitoring views so engineers could see drift, anomalies, and upcoming maintenance windows.
Aligned predictions with spare-parts planning and downtime windows to make the dashboard actionable.
Validated models on historical failures and iterated on class imbalance and labeling noise.

title: Cosmetic data mining & retrieval
description: OCR plus fine-tuned LLMs to extract product details and run a deep learning NLP pipeline for faster, more accurate information retrieval.

imageAlt.gallery: Abstract digital pattern suggesting data extraction and text processing pipelines

whatIDid: Combined OCR pipelines with fine-tuned LLMs to pull structured fields from noisy product imagery and labels.
Built an NLP retrieval layer so teams could query cosmetic catalogs with semantic search, not just keywords.
Normalized entities (brand, shade, ingredients) to support downstream analytics and compliance checks.
Measured retrieval quality and extraction accuracy; fixed systematic errors with data and prompt updates.
Packaged the flow for repeatable batch runs and incremental updates as new SKUs arrived.

title: Workflow & MCP automation
description: LLM agents call business systems through MCP servers; n8n, Zapier, and Make handle schedules, webhooks, retries, and handoffs to humans.
galleryDescription: Bridges model tool use (MCP) with no-code automation so product and ops teams can evolve flows without retraining the whole stack. LangSmith-style tracing fits here for evals and incident review.

imageAlt.gallery: Abstract connected nodes suggesting APIs, webhooks, and agent tool calls across a network

whatIDid: Exposed internal APIs and data sources to LLMs through MCP servers with auth, schemas, and rate limits.
Used n8n, Zapier, and Make for schedules, webhooks, retries, and human approval steps between systems.
Defined clear contracts between model decisions and automation steps so failures were visible and recoverable.
Recommended LangSmith-style tracing and eval hooks so teams could debug tool calls in production.
Documented how to add a new tool or swap a workflow block without rewriting the whole agent stack.
